Email Marketing Pricing

Email programs pricedfor revenue, not open rates.

Automation, campaigns, and list segmentation at fixed monthly scope. ESP platform fees are separate.

Get Email Marketing PricingEmail Marketing Services
At a Glance

Email marketing management starts at $2,000 per month for campaigns and basic automation on lists up to 10,000 contacts and scales to $5,000+ for enterprise automation with behavioral triggers and CRM integration. Every plan covers strategy, copy, design, and deliverability monitoring. ESP subscription costs (Klaviyo, HubSpot, etc.) are separate from management fees. Core automations are usually live within three to four weeks. We work month to month.

Month to month

No long-term lock-in

8–10 clients

Focused roster, not a factory

Fixed scope

Quoted before you sign

Newsletter blasts vs. revenue automation

What changes when sequences, segmentation, and deliverability are managed every week.

Entry level

Starter

Best for: Monthly campaigns and basic automation for lists up to 10,000 contacts.

  • List Audit & Segmentation

    Core

  • Automation Architecture

    Core

  • Campaign Strategy & Calendar

    Core

    Core

Starting investment

$2,000/mo

Recommended starting point

Growth

Best for: Full automation suite, advanced segmentation, and weekly campaigns for lists up to 50,000.

    Standard

  • Automation Architecture

    Standard

    Standard

Scale tier

Scale

Best for: Enterprise email with behavioral triggers, CRM integration, and revenue attribution.

  • List Audit & Segmentation

    Advanced

  • Automation Architecture

  • Campaign Strategy & Calendar

    Advanced

  • Copywriting & Design

    Advanced

Starting investment

$5,000+/mo

ESP costs (Klaviyo, HubSpot, etc.) are separate from management fees.

What's included

Full-service email management from strategy through automation and reporting.

Scope of work

  • List Audit & Segmentation

    List health check, segment structure, and suppression setup for deliverability and relevance.

  • Automation Architecture

    Welcome sequences, lead nurture flows, cart abandonment, re-engagement, and post-purchase series.

  • Campaign Strategy & Calendar

    Monthly campaign plan aligned to sales cycles, product launches, and seasonal opportunities.

  • Copywriting & Design

    Email copy and responsive templates written for engagement and optimized for clicks.

  • A/B Testing

    Subject line, send time, CTA, and content tests to continuously improve open and click rates.

  • Performance Reporting

    Revenue attribution, open rates, click rates, and unsubscribe trends, reported weekly and monthly.

Common Questions

FAQ

Is there a setup fee?>

Most engagements include onboarding and strategy in month one. We quote it upfront. No surprise charges on the first invoice.

Do you require a long-term contract?>

No. Month to month. Results should earn your business, not a contract clause.

What affects my price?>

ESP costs (Klaviyo, HubSpot, etc.) are separate from management fees.

Can I start with a smaller plan and upgrade?>

Yes. Many clients start on Starter and move up once momentum builds. We plan the upgrade path so you are not rebuilding from scratch.

Which email platforms do you work with?>

HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, Mailchimp, and ConvertKit depending on your business and integrations. We recommend the best fit on a strategy call.

How much does email marketing management cost?>

Retainers run $2,000 to $5,000 per month based on list size, number of automations, and send frequency. New automation builds sometimes include a one-time onboarding fee.

How quickly can you launch email automations?>

Welcome and basic nurture sequences usually go live in 2 to 3 weeks. Full funnel automation with segmentation and multiple flows takes 4 to 6 weeks.

Can you improve our email deliverability?>

Yes. We audit SPF, DKIM, and DMARC, clean your list, warm new domains properly, and watch spam complaint rates. Most issues clear within 2 to 4 weeks of fixes.
